metadata.notes: Flow converted internally to LPH. Catalogue section text generated from page headers.
metadata.brandRule: All records normalized to TEXMO as requested.
metadata.sizeFix: CDP0380S and CDP07S size set to 50.
metadata.selectionRule: All pump types grouped by main category. Each selected/main category shows max 2 above/equal and 2 below; band priority ±10, ±20, ±30, ±50 before HP.
metadata.uiUpdate: Compare input screen now opens a separate Compare Results screen.
metadata.categoryRule: Detailed categories are assigned by catalogue section boundaries and shortened category names.
metadata.phaseRule: Phase is derived from detailed category/title, with row-level preservation for categories that have S/T variants.
metadata.dataQa: Texmo workbook rechecked: 35 motors added, 25 agricultural monoblocks reclassified, four Page 32 models restored, and Page 32 single-phase phase/size fields corrected.
